docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARKOULIS, ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT SHERWOOD PARTNERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AS ASSIGNEE FOR THE BENEFIT OF CREDITORS OF SHAMAN CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

FEE FOR STIP OF JUDGMENT AND ORDER THEREON FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARKOULIS, ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT SHERWOOD PARTNERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AS ASSIGNEE FOR THE BENEFIT OF CREDITORS OF SHAMAN CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLNTF A. MARKOULIS SHALL IMMEDIATELY RECOVER FROM DEFT SHERWOOD PARTNERS, INC. ASSIGNEE FOR THE BENEFIT OF CREDITORS SHAMAN CORP, POSSESSION OF COMMERCIAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 2415 THIRD ST.# 229 & 231, SF, CA 94107

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT & ORDER THEREON, DEFT. TO RETURN POSSESSION TO PLNTF. PROPERTY LOCATED AT 2415 THIRD ST. # 229 & 231, SF, CA NO LATER THAN JAN31, 2002. IF DEFT. COMPLIES THE PLNTF SHALL DISMISS THE ACTION IN ITS ENTIRETY, W/O PREJUDICE, ESCH PARTY TO BERA THEIR OWN ATTY'S FEES W/IN 15 DAYS FROM COMPLETE SATISFACTION.THIS ATIP SHALL BE BINDING UPON & INURE TO THE BENEFIT OF ANY SUCCESSORS & ASSIGNS OF THE PARTIES HERETO.
